ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" INTEGER /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "imdb_link" TEXT /* IMDB link to the movie */,
  "poster" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Brief plot summary of the movie */,
  "trailer_link" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used in password hashing */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review left by the user */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the subscription plan in months */,
  "features" TEXT /* Description of the features included in the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "user_subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., PayPal, Credit Card) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_payment_methods" (
  "user_payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number (if applicable) */,
  "card_expiry" TEXT /* Card expiry date (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_payment_methods_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
